title: Pacific Biosciences of California Q4 2021 Earnings Preview
text: The consensus EPS Estimate for PACB Q4 2021 was -$0.29 and the consensus revenue estimate was $36 million with +32.6% year-over-year growth. Over the last 2 years, PACB beat EPS estimates 63% of the time and beat revenue estimates 75% of the time. Preliminary instrument revenues for Q4 2021 were expected to be around $16.2 million, up 19.1% year-over-year, while consumables revenues were likely to be nearly $15 million, up 50% year-over-year. Preliminary service and other revenues for Q4 2021 were expected to be approximately $4.8 million, up 37.1% from the prior-year period. During the quarter, PacBio confirmed placing a record 48 Sequel II/IIe systems, up 37.1% from the year-ago period. Per PacBio, full-year 2021 total revenues were likely to be $130.5 million, up 65% from the comparable figure in 2020.
